import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

from tools.shareholder_tools import get_top_shareholders

print\(f'平安银行: 私募+个人={cs.get\(\\"私募+个人持股\(%\)\\",\\"N/A\\"\)}%, D3得分={cs.get\(\\"D3得分\\",\\"?\\"\)}'\)

ov = m.get\('市场概况', {}\)
print\(f'市场概况: 上涨={ov.get\(\\"上涨家数\\"\)} 下跌={ov.get\(\\"下跌家数\\"\)} 情绪={ov.get\(\\"市场情绪\\"\)}'\)
top3 = m.get\('涨幅前50', []\)[:3]
for st in top3:
